list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Merge remote-tracking branch 'github-desktop-Usernvme-ship-it/mapsa1.0' into pr/84

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Application.Update gensources.iml and compiler.xml.executor": "Debug", "JAR Application.android.jar (1).executor": "Coverage", "JAR Application.android.jar.executor": "Run", "JUnit.GlobalTestSuite.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ChatTagsLlmMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ClientConfigCleanupMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyAccountHistoryMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyAccountsIdsRefresh": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyAssignOrphanedChatsToActiveAccount": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyConvertUrlToCodebaseName": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyHistoryLlmMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyMigrateChatHistory-v2": "true", "RunOnceActivity.CodyProjectSettingsMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.DeprecatedChatLlmMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ToggleCodyToolWindowAfterMigration": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "dart.analysis.tool.window.visible": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "pr/84", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "project.structure.last.edited": "SDKs", "project.structure.proportion": "0.15", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.0" }, "keyToStringList": { "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/New Scratch File": [ "AndroidDataBinding", "HTML" ] } }

task.summary: Update and rename mpsTrueBootstrap.xml to mpsBootstrap.xml

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Merge remote-tracking branch 'github-desktop-Usernvme-ship-it/mapsa1.0' into pr/84
